name: Colliers International Group Inc.
business: Colliers International provides residential property management, painting and restoration services; integrated security systems and manpower; consumer services including franchised closet systems and lawn care; and business services including fulfillment and customer support.

exposures.sentence: The Residential Property Management unit generated $215.0 million of revenues for the year, an increase of 5% over the prior year.
Sales of systems and manpower contributed approximately equally to the growth.
Consumer Services revenues were $93.4 million, up 11% relative to the prior year.
